gist.headline: Viso joins the creative hive
gist.blurb: Viso just landed in the developer showcase under the Creative category. Go give it a spin and see what the community is building.
gist.summary: The community-built app Viso has been added to the Creative section of the developer showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and try out Viso directly from the community apps directory.
gist.visual_concept: Viso is a creative app added to the showcase. To represent this, Polly the bee will wear a painter's beret and work on a canvas, symbolizing the 'Creative' category. The Monitor Robot will assist by holding a picture frame.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, painting on a glowing digital canvas on a wooden easel. A chunky pixel robot with a CRT monitor head stands nearby holding a small picture frame. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and peach pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites, emotionally warm.
